entity: Kobe Bryant career regular-season total points = 33,643 (BBR). Warehouse SUM(avg_pts*gp) undercounts at 32,468 (delta 1,175)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_pts * gp)) AS career_pts FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 977 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 32,468 PTS but BBR's official Kobe Bryant career regular-season total is 33,643. The 1,175-point gap over 20 seasons is the largest single-player delta so far, again consistent with agg_player_season missing rows for one or more Kobe seasons (likely his late injury-shortened years). Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 33,643. FIXED 2026-07 by the curated-layer rebuild (data/audit/rebuild_curated_layer.sql) + fact_game-based playoff derivation; flipped regression -> stable.
